title: pyrrocoma plantaginea
intro: Pyrrocoma plantaginea, also known as the Rocky Mountain pyrrocoma, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as salves, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically to treat various skin conditions.
